PARTIES WERE ORDERED TO CONTACT THE COURT'S ADR COORDINATOR, ELIZABETH KELBER, VIA THE E-MAIL ADDRESS PROVIDED AT TRIAL CALL NO LATER THAN 4:30PM TODAY FOR SCHEDULING OF THE MSC AND THE ADR COORDINATOR'S PHONE NUMBER WAS ALSO PROVIDED. MOTION FOR SUMMARY ADJUDICATION
Off Calendar Jun-16-2022 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEARNACES:

Jordan A. Lavinsky; Hanson Bridgett LLP; 415-777-3200; appearing on behalf of plaintiff New Pacific Hotel Inc.
Brittani A. Jackson; Heuston Hennigan LLP; 213-788-4340; appearing on behalf of defendant Sonder USA Inc.

Court reporter: Kenneth T. Brill, CSR #12797, 866-299-5127, calendar-ca@veritext.com.

Plaintiff's counsel contests the court's tentative ruling. The court rules on evidentiary objections. After reviewing the pleadings and listening to oral arguments the court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF NEW PACIFIC HOTEL INC.'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY ADJUDICATION is DENIED. Triable issues of fact exist as to the tenant's ability to use the premises and performance under the lease.

Proposed order submitted for review. Judge: Charles F. Haines; Clerk: Kenneth B. Hunt; Court reporter: Kenneth T. Brill, CSR #12797, 866-299-5127, calendar-ca@veritext.com. (D501)
